dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal emphasizes multi-indicator confirmation across different data types (PRICE_ACTION + MOMENTUM). Implemented as: (1) Price-action via MA crossover on close/sma_20 detecting retracement setup in trend, (2) Momentum confirmation via RSI_14 (different data type). Tight stops enforced via 2.0% stop_loss_pct constraint (aligns with 2:1 RR requirement). Exit triggers on momentum reversal (RSI crossing 50). Regime limited to TRENDING states per signal specification.

backtest_rule.reason: Signal emphasizes multi-indicator confirmation across different data types (PRICE_ACTION + MOMENTUM). Implemented as: (1) Price-action via MA crossover on close/sma_20 detecting retracement setup in trend, (2) Momentum confirmation via RSI_14 (different data type). source_rule_text: A trader should use the simplest system possible, but add multiple indicators only when each is based on fundamentally different data types, to improve market trading performance without introducing noise.
